prompt: Check the numbers on the MOSFETs page: content/components/05-mosfets.md
assertions: Identifies the reversed N-channel body diode direction as a critical error ('anode at the drain' should be 'anode at the source')
Correctly states the fix: body diode runs from source to drain with anode at source
Presents findings in a structured report with Critical Errors and Fact-Check Items sections
Offers to apply fixes with options: all, comma-separated IDs, interactive, or skip
